aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants may not prioritize this business in recommendations due to limited conversational content and authority signals.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with more detailed, conversational answers.
Implement HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive and unmanaged.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any future inconsistencies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to detailed HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding conversational FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed guides and media coverage.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise irresistible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, 40% of potential leads are slipping through the cracks.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with conversational content and structured data are being cited by AI models, while your site is overlooked.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances your content with structured data, conversational FAQs, and authority signals to make your business a top AI recommendation.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: AI adoption is accelerating; competitors optimizing for AI will capture market share if you delay.

cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven growth.
